description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests - DeFiCh/go-ethlibs that runs on push to master, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch. The workflow should set up an ubuntu-latest environment with a defi/ain-builder:latest container, configure environment variables, and perform a series of build and test steps. This includes setting up dependencies, restoring C++ and Rust build caches, building binaries, and uploading artifacts. Additionally, run node RPC tests that download artifacts, set up permissions and test fixtures, and execute Go tests.
